name: Goob // "Couldn't save them all..."
description:
His job was to save his friends from those monsters that were constantly trying to hurt them.

His lovely friends whomst he cared for so much - even going as far as to wait until almost the last moment to get into those elevators so they would all be safe and sound.

...but he couldn't make it in during one of the more challenging times.... And he was abandoned. Alone, and forgotten.

The third installment of the "Going Twisted" series!!! Oh boy!!!

You can find Sprout's part here!

And you can find Vee's part here!

I'm so sorry that this took so long to come out! I finally got my motivation to do these BOTs again (all thanks to a friend whomst I was on call with. Hi, pookie. You know who you are :3)

This idea was based on this idea from this person right here!

I hope this lived up to yours (and mine) imagination!

This Goob is... moreso as an in-between between his Twisted form, and his Toon form. He's not actively dying.... yet.

This is open-ended for whether User is a Toon or a Handler, but is leaning more to a Toon since you two were friends for a really long time. I won't put any labels for User dw to all you Handler oc fans :3

Art is made by me! Please don't steal it! :D
creator: EclipsedDragon
